**Affected versions:** v0.91.0 (when `security.http.urls` was introduced) through v0.161.1.
**Fixed in:** v0.162.0.
**Severity:** Only relevant for sites that rely on `security.http.urls` as a trust boundary — e.g. CI builds that fetch remote resources but want to constrain which hosts can be reached. Not an issue if you fully trust every URL passed to `resources.GetRemote`.

**Description.** `resources.GetRemote` enforces `security.http.urls` on the URL it is called with, but until v0.162.0 it did not re-validate intermediate URLs on HTTP 3xx redirects. An allowed server (or an attacker controlling its DNS or response) could therefore redirect the request to a host that the policy was meant to forbid — for example, `http://localhost/` or an internal IP — and Hugo would fetch from the redirected target. The same bypass also lifted any host-shape restriction the operator had put in place.

**Mitigation.** v0.162.0 installs a `CheckRedirect` on the HTTP client used by `resources.GetRemote` that re-runs `security.http.urls` on every redirect target and caps the redirect chain at 10 hops. No configuration change is required.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00249, "percentile": 0.16096}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-vxgm-5rmg-5w8g", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-16T19:22:37Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-vxgm-5rmg-5w8g", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-vxgm-5rmg-5w8g"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-50134"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-16T19:22:37Z", "references": ["https://github.com/gohugoio/hugo/security/advisories/GHSA-vxgm-5rmg-5w8g", "https://github.com/gohugoio/hugo/commit/86fbb0f7a8bbb93e2e916390de9e5a4f24bf9f50", "https://github.com/gohugoio/hugo/releases/tag/v0.162.0", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-vxgm-5rmg-5w8g"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/gohugoio/hugo/security-advisories/GHSA-vxgm-5rmg-5w8g", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/gohugoio/hugo", "summary": "Hugo: security.http.urls allow-list bypass via HTTP redirects", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-16T19:22:40Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-vxgm-5rmg-5w8g", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.162.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/gohugoio/hugo"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 0.91.0, < 0.162.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Hugo: security.http.urls allow-list bypass via HTTP redirects
